texto: You think I started out like this?Well, I didn't.I started out like anyone else - young and hopeful. I started out arrogant and in love, assuming the whole dizzy world was where it should be: at my feet. I started out - well, I started out a little like you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gail Levy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “You think I started out like this?Well, I didn't.I started out like anyone else - young and hopef…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, historical-fiction, thriller pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de thriller.
